mapping_policy: Associate every drawing object with the record in the same source column-group and row; preserve overlapping drawings, drawing order, repeated artwork, and missing-image records exactly.
render_policy: Keep the original factory cube thumbnail for Excel and perspective-rectify visible faces for mixed scene use.
portable_face_storage: Table 2 source drawings expose top/front/right. Back/left/bottom reference front/right/top respectively instead of storing duplicate PNG bytes.
